testcase.name: deveManterConsistenciaSobConcorrencia
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-05T08:46:17.831-03:00 INFO 16308 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.backend.TransferenciaConcorrenteTest]: TransferenciaConcorrenteTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-05T08:46:17.833-03:00 INFO 16308 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.backend.BackendApplication for test class com.example.backend.TransferenciaConcorrenteTest
